title: 这条prompt适合用于创建高端、复古且具有艺术感的视觉内容，适用于追求独特美学的品牌营销，如时尚、生活方式或餐饮领域。
image_alt: 这条prompt适合用于创建高端、复古且具有艺术感的视觉内容，适用于追求独特美学的品牌营销，如时尚、生活方式或餐饮领域。
prompt_original: Aesthetic vintage paper collage portrait of a stylish woman taking a mirror selfie, made entirely from torn magazine and newspaper pieces, layered mixed-media artwork, neutral beige and brown tones, Vogue-inspired fashion editorial style, black sunglasses, sleek ponytail hairstyle, white corset top, silver jewelry, purple smartphone, textured ripped paper edges, handcrafted mosaic effect, realistic shadows and depth, chic typography cutouts, inspirational quotes scattered around, cozy luxury aesthetic, highly detailed analog collage art, soft warm lighting, Instagram moodboard vibe, premium editorial composition, ultra detailed, 4k Prompt : Vintage breakfast aesthetic collage made from torn magazine and newspaper clippings, artistic mixed-media paper mosaic style, croissants on a plate with jam, black coffee in a dark cup, fresh fruits and berries, butter dish with knife, café table atmosphere, dark green textured background, ripped paper layers with visible cracks and folds, lifestyle editorial typography, cozy European café vibe, warm earthy tones, handcrafted scrapbook look, realistic paper texture, aesthetic Pinterest moodboard composition, soft cinematic lighting, luxury brunch aesthetic, ultra detailed, high realism, 4k collage art style
prompt_zh: 具有美学感的复古纸拼贴肖像，描绘一位时尚女性在镜子前自拍，完全由撕碎的杂志和报纸碎片制成，多层次混合媒介艺术作品，中性米色和棕色调，Vogue风格的时尚编辑风格，黑色太阳镜，光滑的马尾发型，白色紧身胸衣上衣，银色首饰，紫色智能手机，纹理撕裂的纸边缘，手工制作的马赛克效果，逼真的阴影和深度，时髦的文字剪裁，周围散布着励志名言，舒适的奢华美学，高度细节化的模拟拼贴艺术，柔和温暖的光线，Instagram情绪板氛围，高级编辑构图，超详细，4k。Prompt：由撕碎的杂志和报纸剪辑制成的复古早餐美学拼贴画，艺术性的混合媒介纸马赛克风格，盘子上的羊角面包配果酱，深杯中的黑咖啡，新鲜水果和浆果，带刀的黄油碟，咖啡桌氛围，深绿色纹理背景，可见裂缝和褶皱的撕裂纸层，生活方式编辑字体，舒适的欧洲咖啡馆氛围，温暖的大地色调，手工剪贴簿外观，逼真的纸张纹理，美学Pinterest情绪板构图，柔和的电影照明，奢华早午餐美学，超详细，高写实度，4k拼贴画风格。
